title: App Settings - General - Account - Account delete
scenario: Account deletion flow in Poly Studio Mobile app Settings > General > Account shows Cancel returns to expanded Account tab while Confirm logs user out and removes from Cloud
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
2. Log in to the Lens tenant account.
3. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
4. Tap the delete icon (trash/bin icon) next to the account.
5. In the confirmation dialog that appears, tap the Cancel button.
6. Observe that the dialog closes and the user is returned to Settings → General with the Account tab expanded.
7. Verify the user remains logged in and the account is still present on the Cloud.
8. Navigate back to App Settings → General → Account and tap the delete icon again.
9. In the confirmation dialog, tap the Confirm button.
10. Observe the spinner/loading indicator appears briefly.
11. Observe that an "Account Deleted" popup message appears briefly.
12. Observe that the user is moved back to Settings → General with the Account tab expanded.
13. Verify the user is logged out of the app.
14. Verify the account is no longer present on the Cloud.
expected: When Cancel is tapped, the dialog closes, user returns to Settings > General with Account tab expanded, user remains logged in and account persists on Cloud. When Confirm is tapped, a spinner appears, then an "Account Deleted" popup appears briefly, user is returned to Settings > General with Account tab expanded, user is logged out and account is removed from Cloud.
